## Verification

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or credentials were added.
- [ ] New/changed endpoints validate input.
- [ ] Protected endpoints enforce authentication.
- [ ] Ownership checks are enforced where needed.
- [ ] Admin-only actions require admin authorization.
- [ ] Pricing/checkout logic is calculated server-side.
- [ ] Sensitive data is not logged.
- [ ] Security-relevant tests were added or updated.
- [ ] Docs were updated if behavior changed.

## PR Review Checklist
- [ ] Scope matches the issue
- [ ] No unrelated changes
- [ ] Business logic is not in routes
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Docs updated if needed
- [ ] MVP scope respected

## Flow Alignment

- [ ] Implementation follows the referenced flow
- [ ] No flow steps were skipped or reordered
- [ ] No new behavior was introduced outside the defined flow

If flow changes were required:

- [ ] Flow documentation updated (`docs/flows/...`)
- [ ] Change explained in this PR
